en.name: Level 86 — Rivergate Tower
en.shortDescription: A 31-floor office tower with a modern lobby and interconnected upper floors — mostly safe, its Facelings quietly at work.
en.atmosphere: Corporate calm in clean architecture; Facelings play mundane office workers as the higher floors grow more spacious and orderly.
en.tips: Avoid the hostile Britagne Royaume on floor 14. The boss's office computer holds undocumented level information.
